Text:
![](_page_0_Picture_1.jpeg)

WORK INSTRUCTION – OUTBOUND – UPDATING COO

## **UPDATING THE COUNTRY OF ORIGIN FOR A DELIVERY**

For multi-sourced items it may be required to update the Country of Origin details against the Delivery before this is shipped.

When this is required, the Pack Consolidation Report will show

a \*\* MULTISOURCED – COO REQUIRED \*\* message

*Please note:*

*Multi-sourced items have the Country of Origin identified as 'XX'*

**Step 1:** Using the Oracle Forms, navigate to the 'Shipping Transactions' Form

**Step 2:** Select the 'Deliveries' radio button Enter the Delivery number in the 'From Delivery Name' and 'To Delivery Name' fields

Click on the 'Find' button

**Step 3:** Select the 'Contents' tab

Select the line for the item you want to update and click in the field that contains the Country of Origin 'XX' information – this is usually the last field identified by '[ ]'

**Step 4:** Remove the 'XX' and record the 2-digit code for the actual Country of Origin, taken from the physical product.

In case of multiple Countries of Origin you will need to record the actual quantity per Country of Origin, separating each entry using a semi-colon, for example 'CN=4;TW=6'

Click on 'OK' when the changes are made

Then click on the 'Save' icon in the toolbar to save your changes.

![](_page_0_Figure_18.jpeg)

![](_page_0_Figure_19.jpeg)

![](_page_0_Figure_20.jpeg)

Repeat steps 3-4 for all multi-sourced items for the Delivery

The Country of Origin details are updated for the Delivery.
